name: cosmotech-run-orchestrator

metadata.name: cosmotech-run-orchestrator
metadata.summary: Orchestration suite for Cosmotech Run Templates

documentation:
# cosmotech-run-orchestrator

This library contains the `csm-orc` cli developed by [Cosmo Tech](https://cosmotech.com/) for its Digital
Twin platform.

If you are interested in using it, please contact [Cosmo Tech](https://cosmotech.com/)

## Installation

Documentation on the installation is available on
our [GitHub Page](https://cosmo-tech.github.io/run-orchestrator/)

Once installed you will have access to the `csm-orc` CLI and all its commands.

## Licence

functions.name: cosmotech.orchestrator.console_scripts.scenario_data_downloader.main
documentation:
Uses environment variables to call the download_scenario_data function
Requires a valid Azure connection either with:
- The AZ cli command: **az login**
- A triplet of env var `AZURE_TENANT_ID`, `AZURE_CLIENT_ID`, `AZURE_CLIENT_SECRET`

functions.name: cosmotech.orchestrator.console_scripts.main.main
documentation:
Cosmotech Run Orchestrator
    
Command toolkit allowing to run Cosmotech Run Templates

functions.name: cosmotech.orchestrator.console_scripts.legacy_json_generator.main
documentation:
Base command for the json generator using legacy files  
Check the help of the sub commands for more information:  
- `cloud` requires access to a fully deployed solution  
- `solution` requires a `Solution.yaml` file

functions.name: cosmotech.orchestrator.console_scripts.legacy_json_generator.solution
documentation: Read SOLUTION_FILE to get a RUN_TEMPLATE_ID and generate an orchestrator file at OUTPUT

functions.name: cosmotech.orchestrator.console_scripts.legacy_json_generator.cloud
documentation: Connect to the cosmotech API to download a run template and generate an orchestrator file at OUTPUT

functions.name: cosmotech.orchestrator.console_scripts.download_cloud_steps.main
documentation:
Uses environment variables to download cloud based Template steps
Requires a valid Azure connection either with:
- The AZ cli command: **az login**
- A triplet of env var `AZURE_TENANT_ID`, `AZURE_CLIENT_ID`, `AZURE_CLIENT_SECRET`

modules.name: cosmotech.orchestrator.console_scripts.run

This document and all information contained herein is the exclusive property -

Any use, reproduction, translation, broadcasting, transmission, distribution,
etc., to any person is prohibited unless it has been previously and
specifically authorized by written means by Cosmo Tech.

functions.name: cosmotech.orchestrator.console_scripts.run.main
documentation:
Runs the given `TEMPLATE` file  
Commands are run as subprocess using `bash -c "<command> <arguments>"`.  
In case you are in a python venv, the venv is activated before any command is run.

functions.name: cosmotech.orchestrator.console_scripts.adx_scenario_connector.main
documentation:
Uses environment variables to send content of CSV files to ADX
Requires a valid Azure connection either with:
- The AZ cli command: **az login**
- A triplet of env var `AZURE_TENANT_ID`, `AZURE_CLIENT_ID`, `AZURE_CLIENT_SECRET`

modules.name: cosmotech.orchestrator.console_scripts.run_step

This document and all information contained herein is the exclusive property -

Any use, reproduction, translation, broadcasting, transmission, distribution,
etc., to any person is prohibited unless it has been previously and
specifically authorized by written means by Cosmo Tech.

functions.name: cosmotech.orchestrator.console_scripts.run_step.main
documentation:
Runs a list of steps of a run template in a CosmoTech project
Known limitations:
- The step MUST contain an executable main.py file
- The engine step requires to set the env var CSM_SIMULATION if you have a run without a python engine
- Qt consumers in the simulator breaks the engine step when orchestrating

functions.name: cosmotech.orchestrator.console_scripts.runner_data_downloader.main
documentation:
Download a runner data from the Cosmo Tech API
Requires a valid Azure connection either with:
- The AZ cli command: **az login**
- A triplet of env var `AZURE_TENANT_ID`, `AZURE_CLIENT_ID`, `AZURE_CLIENT_SECRET`

functions.name: cosmotech.orchestrator.console_scripts.parameters_generation.main
documentation:
Base command to initialize parameter folders  
Will create:    
- A `parameters.json`/`parameters.csv` in the folder with all parameters  
- A folder per `%DATASETID%` datasets with the name of the parameter  
Check the help of the sub commands for more information:  
- `cloud` requires access to a fully deployed solution  
- `solution` requires a `Solution.yaml` file

functions.name: cosmotech.orchestrator.console_scripts.parameters_generation.solution
documentation: Initialize parameter folder for given run template from a Solution yaml file

functions.name: cosmotech.orchestrator.console_scripts.parameters_generation.cloud
documentation: Initialize parameter folder for given run template from CosmoTech cloud API

functions.name: cosmotech.orchestrator.console_scripts.entrypoint.main
documentation:
Docker entrypoint

This command is used in CosmoTech docker containers only

methods.name: cosmotech.orchestrator.templates.library.Library.reload
documentation:
Allow a reload of the template library,
should only be used after the content of `sys.path` got changed to check for any new template
